name: getTavily
description: Search the web using Tavily for current news, events, or factual information. Always execute a fresh search — never reuse results from conversation history. If a previous call returned an error or empty result, retry with a revised query or different topic. Supports topic filtering (news, finance) and time range.

searchDepth.description: Search depth: 'basic' (faster, 1 credit) or 'advanced' (more thorough, 2 credits). Default from toolsconfig.

maxResults.description: Number of results to return (default from toolsconfig, max 20).

topic.description: Search category. Use 'news' ONLY for recent breaking events (elections, sports scores, live incidents). Use 'general' for factual questions about people, bands, companies, or anything where accuracy matters more than recency. Default: 'general'.

timeRange.description: Restrict results to this time window (optional).

includeAnswer.description: Request a Tavily-generated answer in addition to results (optional).

includeDomains.description: Only return results from these domains (optional).

country.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code to geo-restrict results, e.g. US, DE (optional).
